Show Notes:

0:00 Discussing Sacks' recent hit on Tucker Carlson

7:25 Media misalignment, subjects as sources, new age of journalism

25:53 Bold prediction for the future of media, potential All-In Network, mistrusting everyone except individuals

34:28 Bestie Guestie Draymond Green joins the show to talk dealing with day-to-day NBA life under COVID protocols, the temperature of the nation, issues with the media & more

1:08:02 Mean tweets

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses media misalignment, the role of subjects as sources in journalism, and the potential future of media. They also touch on the current state of the nation and issues with the media. Draymond Green joins the show to share his experiences with COVID protocols in the NBA and his thoughts on the media.

takeaways.text: Media is often misaligned with reality
Subjects are becoming their own sources
New age of journalism is emerging
Individuals are becoming more trusted sources
COVID protocols have been challenging for NBA players
Media can be overly critical and unfair
Social media can amplify negative voices

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concerns about the state of media and the growing mistrust of institutions. Draymond Green shares his frustrations with COVID protocols and the media.

notable_moments.description: David Sacks discusses his recent appearance on Tucker Carlson
